checklist.entry: Use Service Bindings for private Worker-to-Worker calls where the services are in the same Cloudflare account.
Support both RPC and HTTP styles only where the target Worker exposes the required interface.
Await service binding calls; unawaited service calls may be terminated early.
Deploy the target Worker before deploying the caller Worker that declares the binding.
Plan backwards-compatible service changes when caller and callee Workers deploy independently.
Consider Smart Placement when a Worker calls multiple or distributed backend services.
Use Hyperdrive where a Worker connects to existing PostgreSQL, MySQL or compatible databases and the documented constraints fit the use case.
Do not assume Smart Placement affects non-fetch handlers.
Treat Workers Static Assets as a joint deployment of Worker code and static files.
Review static asset compatibility when using gradual deployments.
Check static asset count and individual file size limits before large uploads.
